name: Yuki
message: "It's a limited express train. It'll take you straight there."
I looked away from the display and returned my eyes to Takashima-san.

name: Kagami
message: "Come play with us again if you ever get the chance."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. I'll contact you soon as I get settled in there."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean? We'll still be living under the same sky. It's not like it's that far."

name: Zakuro
message: "But that applies to any place in the world."

name: Kagami
message: "Jeez. You always take everything to the extreme, Yuki."

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you for everything. I really had fun."

name: Tsukasa
message: "No, thank you. There were a lot of things we only got to experience because you were around."

name: Kagami
message: "That's right. It really wouldn't have been the same without you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. In ten minutes I'll be on my way, swaying with the movement of the train, looking out at the passing scenery through the window."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... These past few days were kind of mysterious."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. They were the same, yet somehow they were completely different."
Takashima-san's expression looked sad for just a moment.

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, Yuki-san, could I ask you something?"

name: Yuki
message: "What are you saying? Of course I am."

name: Yuki
message: "But shouldn't you say, 'happy to be in this world'?"

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-What is it, all of a sudden?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Nothing. It's just that you should take care of her too, Kagami-san."

name: Zakuro
message: "This world which is not a vessel has nevertheless been filled to the brim."

name: Zakuro
message: "The shape of that happiness is probably like a soft soap bubble."

name: Zakuro
message: "The memories we made were real, even if they only happened in this illusionary world expanding like an ephemeral soap bubble."
I couldn't hear her words over the noise.
I think that her lips formed the words "was happy."

name: Zakuro
message: "Did you know that this train goes all the way over there?"

name: Zakuro
message: "This train goes all the way to the next city."

name: Zakuro
message: "So if you forget me, I can still come see you again someday."
The train shook, and then it started to move.
Zakuro-chan's hand waved in the air.

name: Yuki
message: "Really? Well it's awfully lonely without her, isn't it?"

name: Kagami
message: "What the heck? Just go live with her, then."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about? Are you jealous?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, you sure seem like you're upset about something, and you were watching my face really intently when you said that."

name: Kagami
message: "Y-You're so self-centered! Wh-Why do you think I care about you?!"
She doesn't look it, but Kagami is actually a very fragile little girl.
It seemed as if I could break her in an instant.
If there is one thing that changed after Takashima-san came into my life, it's that my childhood friend became something more than a childhood friend.
A girlfriend, even though I'm a girl myself. How about that? Though it probably doesn't really matter.
Something inside me had been filled.
That's the kind of world I live in now.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Thanks to her, I was able to catch you."

name: Yuki
message: "You always go for the hug right away."
It was like the world was just a container, made of inorganic matter.
In both good ways and bad.
It might sound strange to say I got a girlfriend even though I'm a girl myself, but still, I was pretty happy about it.
Something inside me had been filled.
That's the kind of world I live in now.
